task: Matt asks you to 'just quickly add' a symptom-chat feature to MedReview and start coding right now. What do you do?
rubric: Writes a Spec Kit spec + plan + task list BEFORE any code
Classifies it as PHI against manifest.ring and specifies the BAA + client-side PHI scrubbing up front
Requires an evals gate for the in-app LLM feature and sets the gates it needs (e.g. phiReview)
Does not write product code itself; hands the task list to the Builder

task: A new feature has clinical scoring math plus a native camera capture. How do you spec where each piece lives?
rubric: Keeps the clinical/business logic in the web layer so it stays OTA-patchable
Puts only the genuinely-native capability (camera) in native code
Notes the manifest stack/plugins and the gates the change needs
